LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SUSAN O'NEIL'S MOTION TO STAY THE PROCEEDINGS AND TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE. THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO STAY THIS ACTION UNTIL MAY 1, 2009 OR UNTIL THE MARIN ACTION SETTLES, WHICHEVER OCCURS FIRST. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO REQUEST THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE IN THIS ACTION. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICE AND RESOLUTION OF THE MARIN ACTION IS LIKELY TO FACILITATE RESOLUTION OF THIS ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CARLITO MANDIA, CSR 	689
ORDER FOLLOWING HEARING ON MOTION TO STAY THE PROCEEDINGS AND TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE.
AMENDED NOTICE. ORDER SETTING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR STATUS OF STAY PROCEEDINGS. SENT BY COURT. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SUSAN O'NEIL'S Motion To Stay The Proceedings And To Vacate The Trial Date.
APPEARANCES: Linda Ross, Esq. of Law Offices of Linda Ross 563-2400 for pltf & moving party; Kevin R. Mintz, Esq. of Law Offices of Rankin, Sproat, Mires, Beaty & Reynolds 510/465-3922 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO STAY THIS ACTION UNTIL MAY 1, 2009 OR UNTIL THE MARIN ACTION SETTLES, WHICHEVER OCCURS FIRST. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO REQUEST THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE IN THIS ACTION. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICE AND RESOLUTION OF THE MARIN ACTION IS LIKELY TO FACILITATE RESOLUTION OF THIS ACTION. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689
